auth.qrDesc: Scan with WeChat or another connected client to complete sign-in instantly.
auth.loginDesc: Sign in to reach your cloud files, recent activity, and shared workspace.
auth.registerDesc: Create your account to start organizing files across every device.
auth.resetDesc: Enter your email to request a secure reset link.
auth.name: Name
auth.qrScannedHint: Code scanned. Confirm sign-in in your mobile client.
auth.qrWeChatHint: QR sign-in follows the backend channel that is currently enabled.

qrStatus.pending: Scan the QR code to continue

errors.passwordResetFailed: Failed to send the reset request.
errors.qrGenerateFailed: Failed to load the QR code.
errors.invalidQrPayload: The backend returned an invalid QR payload.

oauth.processingDesc: We are verifying the provider callback and creating your session.
oauth.processingHint: Keep this page open for a moment.

hero.title: Keep every file in one disciplined workspace
hero.description: Browse personal files, starred material, recent changes, and trash with a shell tuned for fast keyboard-and-mouse workflows.
hero.fileCount: Visible items in the current view
hero.searchIdle: Use the header search to narrow results
hero.filterActive: Filtered down to a specific file type

drive.title: Keep every file in one disciplined workspace
drive.description: Maintain your primary hierarchy, upload new material quickly, and keep the desktop shell focused on fast everyday file work.
drive.hint: Use this view to manage your main hierarchy.

starred.title: Keep important files one click away
starred.description: Use starred items as a high-signal lane for recurring work, reference material, and folders you revisit all day.
starred.hint: Starred items work best as a fast priority lane.

recent.title: Jump back into what changed most recently
recent.description: Review the latest edits and newly active files without drilling through your full hierarchy.
recent.hint: Recent is ideal for returning to active work quickly.

trash.title: Review and restore before anything is gone
trash.description: Inspect deleted items, recover what still matters, and keep retention under control before permanent cleanup.
trash.hint: Trash is a temporary recovery surface before cleanup.

empty.title: Nothing is here yet
empty.description: Upload files, create a folder, or switch views to continue building out this workspace.
empty.searchDescription: Try a broader keyword, or clear the current search to return to the full view.
empty.filterDescription: No items match the active file-type filter in this location.
empty.trashDescription: Deleted items will stay here until you permanently clear them.

dropzone.title: Drop files to upload
dropzone.description: Add files directly into the current folder without leaving this view.

details.selectionDescription: Batch actions stay available while you compare files, folders, and the current workspace filters.

hints.drive: Create folders, upload files, and keep your main hierarchy clean from here.
hints.starred: Use starred items as a short list of files and folders that matter every day.
hints.recent: Recent activity is the fastest way to jump back into active work without browsing the whole tree.
hints.trash: Review deleted items here before you restore them or clear the trash permanently.

organize.title: Shape the next layer
organize.description: Create a new folder from your main drive root, then move the next wave of files into a cleaner structure.

search.title: Search is narrowing the canvas
search.description: Clear the current query when you want to expand back into the full workspace and browse adjacent files.

filter.title: A file-type filter is active
filter.description: Clear the current filter to compare documents, media, and folders together again.

recent.title: Recent work stays close
recent.description: Use this panel to reopen the latest files quickly before you jump back into the full hierarchy.

starred.title: Your starred shortlist is ready
starred.description: Keep this view lean and intentional so the items here remain a daily launch pad.

trash.title: Trash needs a final decision
trash.description: Review the most recent removals, then restore what matters or clear the bin when the cleanup is complete.

selection.title: Batch work is ready
selection.description: Review the current selection before you download, star, or move items to trash in one pass.

selectionTrash.title: Restore with intent
selectionTrash.description: Review the selected removed items, then restore only what should return to the active workspace.

dialogs.newFolderDescription: Create a new folder in the current location.
dialogs.renameDescription: Give this item a clearer name.

preview.unavailable: Preview is unavailable for this file.
preview.empty: This file has no text content to preview.
preview.copyPathFailed: Failed to copy the file path.

general.title: Workspace preferences
general.description: Tune how this desktop drive feels and behaves on your machine.
general.launchOnStartupDescription: Start the desktop drive when the device session begins.
general.startMinimizedDescription: Open in the background instead of foreground focus.

account.description: Manage your identity, appearance defaults, and safety settings for this desktop workspace.
account.profileDescription: Keep your account identity clean and ready for sync.
account.signOutDescription: Disconnect this device from your current account session.

notifications.title: Notifications & safety
notifications.description: Choose which important signals should keep reaching you.
notifications.systemUpdatesDescription: Receive operational updates and service notices.
notifications.taskFailuresDescription: Alert me when automated work fails.
notifications.securityAlertsDescription: Surface suspicious or sensitive account activity.
notifications.newMessagesDescription: Show in-app notifications for fresh messages.

privacy.shareUsageDataDescription: Allow aggregated diagnostics that improve product reliability.

security.loginAlertsDescription: Notify me when this account signs in from a new context.
